name: v0.17.0
body:
## Highlights

We are excited to announce the 0.17 release of torchao\! This release adds support for cuteDSL MXFP8 MoE kernels, per-head FP8 quantized low precision attention, ABI stability, and more\!

### CuteDSL MXFP8 MoE Kernels

We added a new CuteDSL MXFP8 quantization kernel for 3d expert weights that writes scale factors directly to blocked layout for tensorcores: [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4090](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4090)

* Used for scaling along dim1 in the backward pass of MoE training with grouped GEMMs.   
* \~12% speedup over previous 2 kernel “quantize then scale layout transformation” approach\!

### Per-Head FP8 Quantized Low Precision Attention

We added a new API for per-head fp8 quantized attention with FA3 as the backend ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3959](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3959) and [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3857](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3857)) 

* Users can either choose to use the elementary blocks as direct replacements for \`F.scaled\_dot\_product\_attention\` or use the high-level wrapper, which replaces all F.SDPA calls within a module with the low precision attention variant.  
* Running torch.compile on a wrapped module will enable RoPE fusion where appropriate  
* Results show a **1.18x** speedup on Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B, **1.23x** speedup on LLaMA 3 prefill with high sequence lengths (131k), **1.07x** speedup on flux.1-schnell with 2048x2048 image size

Example Usage of Direct Replacement:

```py
from torchao.prototype.attention.fp8_fa3 import fp8_fa3_sdpa, fp8_fa3_rope_sdpa
out = fp8_fa3_sdpa(q, k, v)
```

Example Usage of Wrapper:

```py
from torchao.prototype.attention import (
    AttentionBackend,
    LowPrecisionAttentionConfig,
    apply_low_precision_attention,
)
# Instantiate any nn.Module()
model = MyModel()

# Simple SDPA replacement
config = LowPrecisionAttentionConfig(backend=AttentionBackend.FP8_FA3)
model = apply_low_precision_attention(model, config)

# Flash activation is handled internally by the wrapper
output = model(inputs)

# Torch.compile will enable rope fusion
model = torch.compile(model)
```

### PyTorch ABI stability

As of [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/issues/3516](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/issues/3516), torchao is now ABI stable for all cuda kernels\! This means if the user is running torch 2.11+, they will be able to access torchao’s cuda kernels without having to upgrade torch version for each new torchao version. This applies to the current and all future torchao releases (0.17.0+). Note that python-only API compatibility is the same as before: we support the latest 3 torch minor versions.

Before:

```py
# Compatible versions for cpp extensions:
torchao 0.16.0 + torch 2.10.0
torchao 0.15.0 + torch 2.9.1
torchao 0.14.1 + torch 2.9.0

# Compatible versions for python-only API
# 3 most recent torch versions:
torchao 0.16.0 + torch 2.10.0, 2.9.1, 2.8.0
torchao 0.15.0 + torch 2.9.1, 2.8.0, 2.7.1
torchao 0.14.0 + torch 2.9.0, 2.8.0, 2.7.0
```

After:

```py
# Compatible versions for cpp extensions (all future releases):
torchao 0.17.0 onwards + any torch 2.11+

# Compatible versions for python-only API
# 3 most recent torch versions (same as before)
torchao 0.17.0 + torch 2.11.0, 2.10.0, 2.9.1
```

## Deprecations

* Deprecate AQT and related classes ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4074](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4074))  

We are planning to remove these classes in the future, so we are deprecating them in advance.
Here are all the classes that now have new deprecation warnings:
```
  Base classes (torchao/dtypes/utils.py):
  1. Layout
  2. PlainLayout
  3. AQTTensorImpl

  torchao/dtypes/affine_quantized_tensor.py:
  4. AffineQuantizedTensor

  torchao/dtypes/floatx/:
  5. Float8Layout
  6. Float8AQTTensorImpl
  7. CutlassSemiSparseLayout
  8. CutlassSemiSparseTensorImpl

  torchao/dtypes/uintx/:
  9. TensorCoreTiledLayout
  10. TensorCoreTiledAQTTensorImpl
  11. SemiSparseLayout
  12. SemiSparseAQTTensorImpl
  13. Int4CPULayout
  14. Int4CPUAQTTensorImpl
  15. Int4XPULayout
  16. Int4XPUAQTTensorImpl
  17. QDQLayout
  18. QDQTensorImpl
  19. PlainAQTTensorImpl
  20. PackedLinearInt8DynamicActivationIntxWeightLayout
  21. PackedLinearInt8DynamicActivationIntxWeightAQTTensorImpl
  ```
  
* Deprecate TorchAODType ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4100](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4100))

This was added for torch 2.5 as a placeholder for torch.int4. Now all torch versions we support have these dtypes, so this class is no longer needed and should not be used by anyone. We will remove it next release (0.18.0).

Before:
```
TorchAODType.INT1
TorchAODType.INT2
TorchAODType.INT3
TorchAODType.INT4
TorchAODType.INT5
TorchAODType.INT6
TorchAODType.INT7
```

After:
```
torch.int1
torch.int2
torch.int3
torch.int4
torch.int5
torch.int6
torch.int7
```
* Delete deprecated GemlitePackedLayout and GemliteUIntXWeightOnlyConfig ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4144](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4144))

`GemliteUIntXWeightOnlyConfig` is now replaced with `torchao.prototype.UIntxWeightOnlyConfig` and `Int8DynamicActivationUIntxWeightConfig`
```
# 0.16:
GemliteUIntXWeightOnlyConfig(group_size, bit_width, packing_bitwidth, mode="weight_only")
GemliteUIntXWeightOnlyConfig(group_size, bit_width, packing_bitwidth, mode="dynamic")
# 0.17
UIntxWeightOnlyConfig(group_size, bit_width, packing_bitwidth)
Int8DynamicActivationUIntxWeightConfig(group_size, bit_width, packing_bitwidth)
```

## Core

* Clean up arglist for `choose_qparams_affine_with_min_max` ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3808](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3808))  
* Extend TorchAOBaseTensor docstring with subclassing and safetensors docs ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3846](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3846))  
* Fix FqnToConfig module skipping for \_default and regex modules ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3877](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3877))  
* Add mxfp8 and nvfp4 support to safetensors ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3668](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3668))  
* \[Prototype\] Add pruning-aware training in torchao.prototype.pat ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3429](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3429))  
* Rocm: scaled\_grouped\_mm support gfx942 fp8 data type ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3955](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3955))  
* Update b200 peak memory bandwidth ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4002](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4002))  
* \[Prototype\] quant\_logger tool for logging weights and activations ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3987](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3987))  
* \[ROCM\] Float8 deepseekv3\_671b IntOverflow in triton kernels during training  ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4016](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4016))  
* \[ROCm\]\[INT4\] Configurable ntile size for TilePacked format ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3834](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3834))  
* Fix Android ARM64 build for torchao lowbit kernels ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4029](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4029))  
* \[mxfp8\] fix exp2f\_rcp to handle special case of unbiased exponent of 127 ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4117](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4117))  
* Remove version compatibility table ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4154](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4154))  
* Suppress deprecation warnings from \#4074 and \#4100 ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4155](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4155))  
* \[xpu\]\[test\] Skip WIP config for Intel GPU in test\_safetensors\_support.py and test\_x86inductor\_fusion.py ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4049](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4049))

## Training

* \[mxfp8 training\] 128b alignment for CUTensormap to support CUDA 13.0+ ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3837](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3837))  
* \[mxfp8 moe training\]\[docs\] add tutorial for training with MXFP8 expert parallel ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3752](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3752))  
* Make `_emulated_mxfp8_scaled_grouped_mm_2d_2d` torch.compile compatible ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3906](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3906))  
* \[moe training\] refactor configs, recipes; support converting linears \+ grouped gemms in a single quantize\_() call ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3862](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3862))  
* Use relaxed memory ordering for Triton atomics on AMDGPU. ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3945](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3945))  
* Fix backward return count mismatch in \_Float8GroupedMM ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3956](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3956))  
* Expand Triton autotune configs for MoE FP8 kernels to improve AMD GPU performance ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3952](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3952))  
* Optimize FP8 colwise scales kernel for AMD GPUs in MoE backward pass ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3972](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3972))  
* TrainingWeightWrapperTensor base class; subclasses for FP8/MXFP8 with grouped\_mm and linear overrides ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3968](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3968))  
* \[mx\] Fix: pass scaling\_mode parameter to triton\_to\_mxfp8\_dim1 ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3686](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3686))  
* Revert expanded MoE FP8 autotune configs that regress DeepSeek V3 shapes ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4024](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4024))  
* \[mxfp8 moe training\] add cuda kernel for per group padding ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3998](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3998))  
* Enable blockwise FP8 training kernels on AMD GPUs (MI300/MI350) ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3996](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3996))  
* \[mxfp8 training\] cuda kernel for unpadding token groups ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4021](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4021))  
* \[ROCm\] bring some mxfp8 quantization unit test back ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3628](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3628))  
* \[moe training\] apply per group padding to fp8 grouped mm ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4045](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4045))  
* \[training\] skip Dtensor/TP integration test pending solution ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4059](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4059))  
* \[mxfp8 training\] clean up torch reference impl for token group padding ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4063](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4063))  
* Add pre-quantized activation support to MXFP8 grouped GEMM (\_to\_mxfp8\_then\_scaled\_grouped\_mm) ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3961](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3961))  
* \[mxfp8 moe training\] \_permute\_bf16 \-\> permute\_and\_pad ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4083](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4083))  
* \[mxfp8 moe training\] update readme ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4084](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4084))  
* \[moe training\] default pad\_token\_groups\_for\_grouped\_mm=False ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4080](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4080))  
* \[TP\] reorder MXFP8 wrapper over DTensor ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4010](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4010))  
* \[ROCm\] Fix ROCm CI failures ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4061](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4061))  
* Add CuTeDSL kernel for 3D tensor quantization to MXFP8 ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4090](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4090))  
* Add bandwidth benchmarking script for fp8 quant blockwise ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4128](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4128))  
* \[mxfp8 moe training\] remove unnecessary memory fences in cutedsl kernel; unify redundant conditionals ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4129](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4129))  
* \[moe training\] Optimize FP8 MoE backward pass: fused colwise kernel \+ AMD tuning ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4069](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4069))  
* \[mxfp8 training\] require torch nightly and cuda 12.8+ ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4141](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4141))  
* Clean up unused rocm references in test\_training.py ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4170](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4170))  
* \[mxfp8 training\] add cutedsl kernel for mxfp8 quantation along dim0 ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4156](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4156))

## Inference

* Add aten.select op support to int4\_packed\_to\_4d\_tensor ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3874](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3874))  
* Separately control the activation quantization granularity ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3524](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3524))  
* Avoid MSLK on NVIDIA B200/GB200 for per-tensor scaled weights (fallback to TORCH) ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3786](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3786))  
* Add plain int4\_packing\_format support for Float8DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3714](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3714))  
* Move mx documentation from README.md to docs site ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3915](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3915))  
* Land 3894, 3887, 3884, 3883 into main from base branch ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3920](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3920))  
* Fix up nvfp4 roofline sweep script ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3927](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3927))  
* Add asymmetric support for Int8Tensor \+ SmoothQuant ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3900](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3900))  
* Small fix for inference roofline model ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3990](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3990))  
* Update inference.md with more context on roofline model ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3991](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3991))  
* Add parameter\_name support to \_mx\_inference\_linear\_transform ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3975](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3975))  
* Add parameter\_name support to \_nvfp4\_inference\_linear\_transform ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3976](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3976))  
* Add FP8 FA3 low-precision attention with monkey-patch SDPA path ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3959](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3959))  
* Added new API for low precision fp8 attention using FA3 ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3857](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3857))  
* Fix nvfp4 static roofline and add nvfp4 dynamic roofline ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4030](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4030))  
* Remove rope fusion option, do automatically on torch compile ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4055](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4055))  
* \[Prototype\] Added prototype low precision attention API to the docs ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4056](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4056))  
* Clean up flux-1.schnell benchmark and add to docs ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4072](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4072))  
* Hook up mslk's to\_nvfp4 kernel to torchao's inference nvfp4 workflows ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4031](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4031))  
* Improve mslk docs ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4077](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4077))  
* Delete old torchao to\_nvfp4 triton kernel ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4078](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4078))  
* Implement per-group quantization for Int8WeightOnlyConfig ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4018](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4018))  
* \[reland\]\[xpu\] INT8 quantization on Intel XPU ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3782](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3782))

## PT2E Quantization

* Add support for `torch._higher_order_ops.scan` in pt2e quantization ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3882](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3882))  
* Assign meta\["val"\] to new bias nodes in fold\_bn\_weights\_into\_conv\_node. ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3907](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3907))  
* Add AffineFakeQuantize for groupwise quantization support ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3848](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3848))  
* Add support for `torch._higher_order_ops.while_loop` in pt2e quantization ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3916](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3916))  
* Add Linear+BN folding to *fuse\_conv\_bn*() ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3917](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3917))  
* Fix deprecated TreeSpec CTOR ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4109](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4109))

## New Contributors

* @mohammed-saalim made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3808](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3808)  
* @oelachqar made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3832](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3832)  
* @sxu made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3838](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3838)  
* @JacobSzwejbka made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3807](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3807)  
* @immerSIR made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3864](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3864)  
* @ArivunidhiA made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3869](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3869)  
* @lordaarush made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3786](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3786)  
* @lyprince made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3893](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3893)  
* @SS-JIA made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3917](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3917)  
* @wenchenvincent made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3945](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3945)  
* @brucechanglongxu made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3952](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3952)  
* @lizamd made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3972](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3972)  
* @ugolowic made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3686](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3686)  
* @alex-minooka made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4016](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4016)  
* @bbeckca made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4064](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4064)  
* @pianpwk made their first contribution in [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4010](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/4010)

**Full Changelog**: [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/compare/v0.16.0...v0.17.0-rc1](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/compare/v0.16.0...v0.17.0-rc1)

name: v0.16.0
body:
## Highlights

We are excited to announce the 0.16.0 release of torchao! This release adds support for MXFP8 MoE Building Blocks for Training with Expert Parallelism and deprecated older versions of some configs and less used quantization options to keep torchao leaner! We also revamped our [doc page](https://docs.pytorch.org/ao/main/), [README](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/blob/main/README.md) and made some progress in making torchao [ABI stable](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/issues/3516).

### MXFP8 MoE Building Blocks for Training with Expert Parallelism

This release includes the following differentiable building blocks for MXFP8 MoE Training with expert parallelism:

* [a2a\_dispatch\_mxfp8\_fwd\_hp\_bwd](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/blob/eb39a84e6ef89de70f0734877eaa521e0ac39d43/torchao/prototype/moe_training/ep/a2a_dispatch.py#L143): All-to-all token dispatch (MXFP8 forward pass, BF16 backward pass)  
* [permute\_mxfp8\_fwd\_hp\_bwd](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/blob/eb39a84e6ef89de70f0734877eaa521e0ac39d43/torchao/prototype/moe_training/ep/permute.py#L212): Permute and pad tokens for MXFP8 computation (MXFP8 forward pass, BF16 backward pass)  
* [\_to\_mxfp8\_then\_scaled\_grouped\_mm](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/blob/eb39a84e6ef89de70f0734877eaa521e0ac39d43/torchao/prototype/moe_training/scaled_grouped_mm.py#L1006): MXFP8 grouped GEMM for routed expert computation (**new:** optionally accepts pre-quantized inputs). Produces bfloat16 output.  
* [unpermute\_hp\_fwd\_mxfp8\_bwd](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/blob/eb39a84e6ef89de70f0734877eaa521e0ac39d43/torchao/prototype/moe_training/ep/unpermute.py#L115): Unpermute tokens back to original order (BF16 forward pass, MXFP8 backward pass)  
* [a2a\_combine\_hp\_fwd\_mxfp8\_bwd](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/blob/eb39a84e6ef89de70f0734877eaa521e0ac39d43/torchao/prototype/moe_training/ep/a2a_combine.py#L161): All-to-all token combine (BF16 forward pass, MXFP8 backward pass). Note the actual combine/aggregation op does not happen here, the naming is just to indicate it is intended to be used for the all2all immediatley preceding the aggregation.

These autograd functions can be chained together to implement efficient MoE training with expert parallel comms and grouped GEMMs in MXFP8.

This approach achieves 10% \- 25% tokens/second speedup for DeepSeekV3 16b training:

* \+10% tokens/second on single node 8xB200 with NVLink intra-node networking for inter-device communication.  
* \+25% tokens/second on multi-node B200 cluster with IB inter-node networking and NVLink intra-node networking.

## Deprecations

* Deprecate v1 of `Float8WeightOnlyConfig`, `Float8DynamicActivationFloat8WeightConfig`,  `Int8DynamicActivationIntxWeightConfig`, `IntxWeightOnlyConfig`, `Int4WeightOnlyConfig` ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3510](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3510), [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3511](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3511), [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3512](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3512), [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3513](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3513))

```py
# v0.15.0 - version 1 was available.
config = Float8WeightOnlyConfig(version=1, ...)
config = Float8DynamicActivationFloat8WeightConfig(version=1, ...)
config = Int8DynamicActivationIntxWeightConfig(version=1, ...)
config = IntxWeightOnlyConfig(version=1, ...)
config = Int4WeightOnlyConfig(version=1, ...)

# v0.16.0 - use version 2 (default). Using version 1 is no longer supported.
config = Float8WeightOnlyConfig(version=2, ...)
config = Float8DynamicActivationFloat8WeightConfig(version=2, ...)
config = Int8DynamicActivationIntxWeightConfig(version=2, ...)
config = IntxWeightOnlyConfig(version=2, ...)
config = Int4WeightOnlyConfig(version=2, ...)
```

* Move `Int8DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig`, `Int4DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig`, `GemliteUIntXWeightOnlyConfig`, `Float8StaticActivationFloat8WeightConfig`, `UIntXWeightOnlyConfig`, `FPXWeightOnlyConfig` to prototype ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3491](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3491))

```py
# v0.15.0
from torchao.quantization import (
    Int8DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig, 
    Int4DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig, 
    GemliteUIntXWeightOnlyConfig, 
    Float8StaticActivationFloat8WeightConfig, 
    UIntXWeightOnlyConfig, 
    # removed in this release
    FPXWeightOnlyConfig,
)

# v0.16.0. These workflows may be deleted in a future version
from torchao.prototype.quantization.quant_api import (
    Int8DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig, 
    GemliteUIntXWeightOnlyConfig, 
    Float8StaticActivationFloat8WeightConfig, 
    UIntXWeightOnlyConfig, 
    # removed in this release
    FPXWeightOnlyConfig,
    Int4DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig,
)
```

* Remove `Int4DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig`, `FPXWeightOnlyConfig`, `Float8DynamicActivationFloat8SemiSparseWeightConfig and SRELUFloat8SemiSparseDynamicActivationFLoat8WeightConfig` ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3723](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3723), [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3520](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3520), [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3744](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3744))

```py
# v0.15.0
config = Int4DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig()
config = FPXWeightOnlyConfig(3, 2)
config = fpx_weight_only(3, 2) # deprecated alias
config = Float8DynamicActivationFloat8SemiSparseWeightConfig()                                                                                                                                                                                                             
config = SRELUFloat8SemiSparseDynamicActivationFloat8WeightConfig()                                                                                                                                                                                                        
quantize_(model, config)

# v0.16.0
# 
The configs are dropped. Please use torchao <= 0.15.0 to use these configs.
```

* Remove `CutlassInt4PackedLayout`, `MarlinQQQLayout`, `CutlassSemiSparseLayout` ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3723](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3723),  [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3612](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3612), [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3613](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3613), [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3744](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3744))

```py
# v0.15.0
## CutlassInt4PackedLayout
config = Int8DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig(
  group_size=None,
  mapping_type=MappingType.SYMMETRIC,
  act_mapping_type=MappingType.SYMMETRIC,
  layout=CutlassInt4PackedLayout(),
)

## MarlinQQQLayout
config = Int8DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig(layout=MarlinQQQLayout())
config = Int4DynamicActivationInt4WeightConfig(layout=MarlinQQQLayout())

## MarlinSparseLayout
apply_fake_sparsity(model)    
config = Int4WeightOnlyConfig(layout=MarlinSparseLayout(), version=1)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
config = Int4WeightOnlyConfig(int4_packing_format="marlin_sparse", version=2)                                                                                                                                                                                                         

## CutlassSemiSparseLayout
config = Float8DynamicActivationFloat8SemiSparseWeightConfig(layout=CutlassSemiSparseLayout())

## quantizing the model with the config
quantize_(model, config)

# v0.16.0
# The config and layout options are dropped. Please use torchao <= 0.15.0 to use the layout
```

* Remove Old GPTQ Implementation ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3720](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3720))

```py
# v0.15.0
from torchao.quantization import MultiTensorInputRecorder, Int4WeightOnlyGPTQQuantizer
model = get_model()
input_recorder = MultiTensorInputRecorder()
for i in range(calibration_limit):
    args = get_next_input()
    input_recorder(*args)
quantizer = Int4WeightOnlyGPTQQuantizer()
args = input_recorder.get_recorded_inputs()
quantizer.quantize(model, *args)
args = get_next_input()
out = model(*args)

# v0.16.0 - this functionality is deleted. We are starting over
# for GPTQ in https://github.com/pytorch/ao/tree/main/torchao/prototype/gptq
```

* Delete Old SmoothQuant Implementation ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3495](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3495))

```py
# v0.15.0 from torchao.quantization.smoothquant import (
    swap_linear_with_smooth_fq_linear,
    smooth_fq_linear_to_inference,
)

swap_linear_with_smooth_fq_linear(model_copy, alpha=0.75)
model_copy(**encoded_input)
smooth_fq_linear_to_inference(model_copy)

# v0.16.0 - the functionality above is deleted. Use `torchao.prototype.smoothquant`
# instead (https://github.com/pytorch/ao/tree/main/torchao/prototype/smoothquant) 
```

* Add deprecation warning to `torchao.autoquant` ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3741](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3741))

This functionality will be removed in a future release of torchao. Please see [https://github.com/pytorch/ao/issues/3739](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/issues/3739) for context.

## New Features

* Add INT8 Static Quantization Workflow ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3442](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3442))  
* \[Prototype\] Add support for MXFP8 and MXFP4 QAT ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3644](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3644))  
* \[Prototype\] MXFP8 MoE training  
  * Add `wgrad_with_hp` option for mxfp8 moe training ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3508](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3508))  
  * MXFP8 `a2a_dispatch` autograd function ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3579](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3579))  
  * MXFP8 token `permute` autograd func \+ triton kernels ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3580](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3580))  
  * MXFP8 `unpermute` autograd function ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3581](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3581))  
  * MXFP8 a2a\_combine autograd function ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3582](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3582))  
  * Handle pre-quantized inputs/grads in forward/backward of \_MXFP8GroupedMM autograd func ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3583](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3583))  
  * Add benchmark for e2e mxfp8 EP pipeline ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3585](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3585))  
  * Export `wgrad_with_hp` recipe to quantize\_ api ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3611](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3611))  
  * Fallback cuda kernel for when input doesn't meet 2d TMA constraints ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3708](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3708))  
  * Add `emulated` mode ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3724](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3724))  
  * Add support for MXFP8 All gather  ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3435](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3435))  
  * Integrate cuda kernel for 'groups along M scale blocked layout' ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3556](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3556))  
  * Default to triton kernel for dim0 cast ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3560](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3560))  
  * `_to_mxfp8_then_scaled_grouped_mm` wrapper that accepts keyword args ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3561](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3561))  
  * auto-select chunk\_width in cuda blocked layout kernel ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3658](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3658))  
  * `scaled_grouped_mm` support gfx942 fp8 data type ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3540](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3540))  
  * Add custom sharding for triton dim0 quant kernel ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3812](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3812))  
  * Bug fix and test updates related to new triton\_calculate\_scale param ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3522](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3522))  
  * Update bench script to use new cuda wrapper ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3562](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3562))  
  * Fix torch ref impl of SF blocked layout per group along K ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3603](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3603))  
  * Only use `torch._dynamo.nonstrict_trace` if it exists in the torch version ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3650](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3650))  
  * cuda blocked layout kernel handling for skinnier scale tensors ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3656](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3656))  
  * Fix bench script bug for dim0 mxfp8 rceil ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3665](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3665))  
  * Register constant with pytree ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3667](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3667))  
  * Update tensor subclass emulated param name ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3811](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3811))

## Improvement

* Fix NVFP4 QAT convert path ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3450](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3450))  
* Adding Int8 weight only and dynamic configs to safetensors ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3474](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3474))  
* DTensor support for bfloat16 stochastic rounding ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3266](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3266))  
* Remove unused exception parameter from multifeed/recommendation\_platform/corpus/backfill/BackfillMain.cpp ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3445](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3445))  
* Enable use of dinov2 models for offload benchmark\_low\_bit\_adam for intel GPU ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3191](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3191))  
* Migrate `Float8SemiSparseTensor` off of AQT ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3361](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3361))  
* Support NVFP4 FP32 bias ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3525](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3525))  
* Remove `permute` op for FP8 conv ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3533](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3533))  
* Refine from\_recipe\_name to support mxfp8 on rocm. ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3620](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3620))  
* Enable smoothquant for int8 static tensor ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3468](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3468))  
* Allow non-tensor kwargs in prepare\_pt2e ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3642](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3642))  
* Add GPTQ to prototype ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3517](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3517))  
* Support per tensor quantization for FP8 mslk KernelPreference ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3715](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3715))  
* Add keepdim support for AffineQuantizedMinMaxObserver ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3748](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3748))  
* Reduce memory consumption during sparse\_2x4\_cutlass\_float8\_tensor::dequantize ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3738](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3738))  
* Make `rowwise_scaled_linear_sparse_cutlass` ABI stable ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3725](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3725))  
* Add `HQQ` option in `UIntxWeightOnlyConfig` ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3829](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3829))  
* Support `RCEIL` in `triton_to_mxfp8_dim0` kernel with inline PTX for mxfp8 ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3498](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3498))  
* Add pinned memory support for `Int8Tensor` ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3489](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3489))  
* Add pinned memory support for `Float8Tensor`  ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3526](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3526))  
* Add Linux aarch64 wheels ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3359](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3359))  
* Support FP8 output for `scaled_embedding_bag` for CPU ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3755](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3755))

## Bug Fixes

* Fix NVFP4 QAT backward typo ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3478](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3478))  
* Use python version agnostic binding for mxfp8 cuda kernels ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3471](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3471))  
* Make `FqnToConfig` handle module swap configs ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3492](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3492))  
* Fix NVFP4 QAT mixed precision ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3501](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3501))  
* Fix regression from distributed op changes in pytorch ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3548](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3548))  
* Update version compatibility to allow torch 2.11.0.dev ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3545](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3545))  
* Fix fake fusion for convolutions without bias in pt2e quant flow ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3633](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3633))  
* Fix Int8Tensor v2 to use float32 eps for better bfloat16 precision ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3664](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3664))  
* Make torchao import not initialize cuda ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3676](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3676))  
* Fix torchao circular imports for BUCK ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3816](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3816))

## Performance

* Roofline quantized conv3d/2d layer  ([https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3419](https://github.com/pytorch/ao/pull/3419))
